docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TREATS LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AVP DISTRIBUIDORA $4,791.43 PRINCIPAL, $265.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,056.43, THIS CASE IS CONSOLIDATED WITH CSM-21-865111. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARCIO DE SILVA, CFO FILED BY DEFENDANT AVP DISTRIBUIDORA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ROGER JIN, OWNER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TREATS LLC
(SC-220)REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS -REQUEST & RESPONSE MAILED TO PLANTIFF FILED BY DEFENDANT AVP DISTRIBUIDORA

ORDER ON REQUEST FOR TIME PAYMENTS (SC-222).THE REQUEST IS "APPROVED", AND THE COURT ORDERS:PAYMENTS OF $500.00 ON THE 10TH DAY OF EACH MONTH, STARTING DATE: JUNE 10, 2022 UNTIL: MARCH 10, 2023. THE AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT: $556.43. THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF PAYMENTS IS: $5,056.43. IF ANY PAYMENT IS NOT MADE IN FULL AND ON TIME, THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR MAY NOTIFY THE COURT TO CANCEL THE PAYMENT PLAN AND THE ENTIRE UNPAID BALANCE WILL BECOME DUE AND COLLECTIBLE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,331.43 FILED BY TREATS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT AVP DISTRIBUIDORA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PORTUGUESE (BRAZILIAN) INTERPRETER TO FEB-04-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF TREATS LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ROGER JIN (OWNER). DEFENDANT AVP DISTRIBUIDORA IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARCIO DA SILVA, ASSISTED BY FRIEND CARINA SUZA FOR PORTUGUESE TO ENGLISH TRANSLATION.. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $65) SERVED NOV-03-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AVP DISTRIBUIDORA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-18-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF TREATS LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ROJER JIN (OWNER). DEFENDANT AVP DISTRIBUIDORA IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARCIO DA SILVA (CFO), ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED PORTUGUESE COURT INTERPRETER STELLA HECHT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CSM-21-865111 WITH CASE CSM-21-864863, ORDER
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PORTUGUESE INTERPRETER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2022 - CONTINUED TO MAR-18-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 TO BE HEARD WITH RELATED CASE CSM-21-865111 TREATS LLC V. AVP DISTRIBUIDORA. PLAINTIFF TREATS LLC, REPRESENTED BY ROGER JIN (OWNER) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AVP DISTRIBUIDORA, REPRESENTED MARCIO DE SILVA (CFO) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED PORTUGESE INTERPERTER STELLA HECHT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
